zh.lifeSummary: 當William I de Pakenham於1250年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham30歲，母親Muriel de Morin15歲。他和Joan de Morin至少有5個兒子。他去世於1304年11月7日在英國英格蘭素福爾可易沃斯享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William I de Pakenham于1250年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham30岁，母亲Muriel de Morin15岁。他和Joan de Morin至少有5个儿子。他去世于1304年11月7日在英国英格兰素福爾可易沃斯享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When William I de Pakenham was born in 1250, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham, was 30 and his mother, Muriel de Morin, was 15. He had at least 5 sons with Joan de Morin. He died on 7 November 1304, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William I de Pakenham est né en 1250, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Morin, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Joan de Morin. Il est décédé le 7 novembre 1304, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William I de Pakenham 1250 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham 30 und seine Mutter Muriel de Morin 15. Er hatte mit Joan de Morin mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 7. November 1304 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William I de Pakenham è nato il nel 1250 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Muriel de Morin, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Joan de Morin. Morì il 7 novembre 1304, nel Ixworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William I de Pakenhamが1250年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John 'le Clerk' de Pakenhamは30歳，母Muriel de Morinは15歳であった。彼はJoan de Morinとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1304年11月7日にイギリスイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William I de Pakenham(이)가 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel de Morin(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Joan de Morin(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1304년 11월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스워스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William I de Pakenham родился в 1250 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John 'le Clerk' de Pakenham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Morin, 15. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Joan de Morin. Он умер 7 ноября 1304 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
